chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P N0.0-432 0f 2023 ٥٥٦٤ Order with signature of Judge For orUers on office objections For DrDgrs on CMMA No.5569/2023 For orUers on CMA No.5570/2023 For hearing of mai [٥5٤, 13.03.2024 Mr, Riaz Ali Shaikh Aovocate for the Petitioner M٢ Abdul Sattar Mahesar, Advocate for Intervener Mr Ahmed Ali Shahani, AAG ق7و77 Hووووووو At the outset learned Counsel for the Petitioner does not press instant petition submits that applicant would availproper remedy provided under the law. Learned AAG has no objection Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with pending applicationls/ ٥٨٥
